home.hero_title: Your AI-Powered Election Guide for a Stronger Democracy
home.hero_subtitle: Understand the complete Indian election process, register to vote, compare candidates, and practice voting — all with AI assistance in your language.
home.feature_ai_desc: Ask any question about elections, voter registration, and electoral process in simple language.
home.feature_journey_desc: Interactive step-by-step guide through all 7 stages of the Indian election process.
home.feature_timeline_desc: Track important election dates and set reminders for key deadlines.
home.feature_candidates_desc: Compare candidates using AI analysis of their background, assets, and manifestos.
home.feature_vote_desc: Practice the voting process with our realistic EVM and VVPAT simulation.
home.feature_multilingual_desc: Get election guidance in English, Hindi, and Tamil — your language, your choice.
